summary: Frontend-only iteration 5 verification PASSED for all 7 requested checks on BLOWUP studio site (desktop 1920x1080 + mobile 375x812). Services/'Hvad vi laver' section + 'Studie' nav fully removed; section order is correct (01 Vælg din session -> 02 Lyt til artisterne -> 03 Oplev artisterne -> 04 Et rum at lave hits i -> 05 Hvad kunderne siger -> 06 Sig hej); configurator is single-select with no 'Ekstra custom beat' addon; all 3 outbound hrefs exact match (Planway, BeatStars, Instagram coprod with full query string); contact form fully removed (0 inputs, 0 textarea, 0 'Send' submit) — only email link, address link, and map iframe remain; Artists title is 'Oplev artisterne.'; programmatic scan found 0 full-width horizontal divider spans outside <footer>; no horizontal overflow on mobile (docW=375 == winW=375).

issues: With the form removed the left column (email card + address card) only fills ~60% of the right column's map height, leaving a noticeable vertical empty band beneath the two cards on desktop (lg breakpoint and up). Visually it works (alternating dark backgrounds keep the rhythm) but the section feels a bit sparse compared to the rest of the page. Consider either: (a) stretching the two cards to fill the column with flex-1, (b) adding a third card (e.g. opening hours / social CTA / Discord), or (c) lowering the section's vertical padding.
Two beat cards look balanced on desktop and mobile, layout is clean. Visual: no issues.

verifications.services_section_removed: 0 #studie sections, 0 'Hvad vi laver' text, 0 'Studie' nav links
section_order_titles: Et rum at lave hits i.
verifications.configurator_single_select: PASS — clicking option 1 then option 3 leaves exactly 1 selected (border-brand applied to only the clicked one)
verifications.contact_form_removed: 0 inputs, 0 textarea, 0 'Send' submit; contact-email-link present (1); map iframe present (1); address link present
verifications.cursor_dot_no_mix_blend: index.css .cursor-dot has no mix-blend-mode or will-change rule — black-square scroll artifact fix confirmed in CSS source

console_observations: One non-blocking PAGEERROR observed: 'Minified React error #418' (hydration/HTML mismatch warning). Not related to this iteration's CSS/markup changes — it appears on initial load and does not break rendering. Likely originates from the Preloader or Reveal/motion components mounting before hydration completes. Worth investigating in a future iteration but does not affect any of the visual/functional checks in this iteration.
action_items: (Optional, aesthetic) Balance the Contact section vertically on desktop now that the form is gone — e.g. flex-1 on the two left cards, or add a 3rd card (Discord/social/opening hours) to fill the empty space beneath the two existing cards.
(Optional, separate issue carried over from iteration 4) Investigate React minified error #418 on page load — possible hydration mismatch from Preloader/motion mount.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js order matches spec exactly: Hero -> Marquee -> Stats -> Configurator -> Releases -> Artists -> Gallery -> Reviews -> Contact -> Footer. Services import removed.

data.js: nav array has only Session/Lyt/Artister/Kontakt — 'Studie' correctly absent. readyBeat, customBeat, booking links exactly match the requested URLs (verified character-by-character via DOM hrefs).

Configurator.jsx uses useState single value for sel; clicking an option calls setSel(s.id) which is single-select by construction. addonBeat is still exported in data.js but is no longer imported/rendered in Configurator.jsx — safe to leave or clean up in a future pass (dead export). Services.jsx file still exists on disk but is not imported anywhere in App.js, so it is dead code (recommend deleting to keep bundle lean).
Contact.jsx is now markup-only (no useState, no form, no fetch) — clean. Email link uses mailto:, address link uses Google Maps URL with embed param stripped — both correct.
Artists.jsx line 83: SectionHeader title='Oplev artisterne.' — confirmed.
SectionHeader.jsx contains no <span class='h-px ...'> divider — only [index, label] in a flex row above the h2. DOM scan returned 0 thin (h<=3px, w>=150px) colored spans outside <footer>.
index.css .cursor-dot block (lines 102-117) has no mix-blend-mode and no will-change — black-square scroll artifact fix in place.
test_credentials: N/A — public landing page, no auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure CSS/markup verification iteration. All testid hooks (configurator, session-option-<id>, configurator-book-btn, buy-ready-beat, buy-custom-beat, contact, contact-email-link, contact-address-link, preloader) are in place and work reliably. Use window.lenis.scrollTo('#id', { immediate: true }) for in-page navigation (smooth scroll otherwise breaks timing). Hero section has no id='hero' — use 'main > section:first-child' or scrollTo(0,0) instead. React minified error #418 is pre-existing and non-blocking. Services.jsx and addonBeat in data.js are dead exports if cleanliness matters.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The only minor aesthetic note is that the Contact section's left column now feels short relative to the map iframe on desktop because the form that previously filled that space was removed by design.
